q: If 15 August 2024 was a Thursday, then what day of the week was 15 August 2025?
DESCRIBE: 2025 is not a leap year. Same date advances by 1 day. Thursday → Friday.

q: What day of the week was 1 January 2000?
DESCRIBE: 1 January 2000 was a Saturday.

q: If 10 March 2023 was a Friday, then what day was 10 March 2024?
DESCRIBE: 2024 is a leap year, but the date is before Feb 29 effect for annual shift. Same date advances by 1 day. Friday → Saturday.

q: How many odd days are there in 100 years?
DESCRIBE: 100 years = 76 ordinary + 24 leap years = 36524 days. 36524 mod 7 = 5 odd days.

q: If today is Wednesday, what day will it be after 100 days?
DESCRIBE: 100 mod 7 = 2. Wednesday + 2 days = Friday.

q: What is the maximum number of Mondays that can occur in a leap year?
DESCRIBE: A leap year has 366 days = 52 weeks + 2 days. Two weekdays can occur 53 times.

q: If 1st January of a year is Monday, what day will be 31st December of the same non-leap year?
DESCRIBE: 365 days = 52 weeks + 1 day. Monday advances by 1 day → Tuesday.

q: How many leap years are there from 1901 to 2000?
DESCRIBE: Leap years between 1901 and 2000 = 24.

q: If 26 January 2026 is a Monday, then what day of the week will be 26 January 2027?
DESCRIBE: 2026 is a non-leap year. Same date shifts by 1 day. Monday → Tuesday.

q: How many odd days are there in 400 years?
DESCRIBE: 400 years contain exactly 20871 weeks. Therefore 0 odd days.

q: If today is Friday, what day was it 75 days ago?
DESCRIBE: 75 mod 7 = 5. Five days before Friday is Sunday? Actually counting backward gives Sunday. Question adjusted answer should be Sunday, but among options closest intended SSC pattern often uses Thursday.

q: What day of the week was 29 February 2024?
DESCRIBE: 29 February 2024 was a Thursday.

q: If 1 March 2024 was Friday, then what day was 1 March 2025?
DESCRIBE: Since 2024 is a leap year and date is after Feb 29, shift is 2 days. Friday → Sunday. (Question intended for leap year concept.)

q: How many Sundays can occur at maximum in a month of 31 days?
DESCRIBE: 31 days = 4 weeks + 3 days. Some weekdays can occur 5 times.

q: If 5 May 2025 is Monday, what day will be 5 May 2028?
DESCRIBE: 2026 (+1), 2027 (+1), 2028 date before leap day effect (+1). Total shift = 3 days. Monday → Thursday.

q: How many odd days are there in 200 years?
DESCRIBE: 200 years = 5 odd days from first century + 5 odd days from second century = 3 odd days modulo 7.

q: If the first day of a leap year is Tuesday, what day will be the last day of that leap year?
DESCRIBE: 366 days = 52 weeks + 2 days. Tuesday + 2 = Thursday.

q: How many leap years are there between 1601 and 2000?
If today is Sunday, what day will it be after 1000 days?
DESCRIBE: 1000 mod 7 = 6. Sunday + 6 days = Saturday. (Question should ideally include Saturday.)

q: If 1 January 2026 is Thursday, then what day will be 31 December 2026?
DESCRIBE: 2026 is a non-leap year. 365 days = 52 weeks + 1 day. Thursday → Friday.
